package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for updates_with_struct_used_for_patch_without_field_intent_helper: PATCH-style repository writes that rely on struct zero-value semantics without explicit field intent.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule214NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule214NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule214NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario214Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule214NegativeService, input Rule214NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
